form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes off a 43 day let-up. Last start 4th of 7 at this track on February 22 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Shesgotclass with 61.5kg at $3.80. The run before that ran on strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 11 at this track on January 31 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Babelicious with 55kg at $4. Racing well and is nicely placed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Applied pressure to Rikkittikkitavi leaving the 200m.

form.formComment: Comes off a 61 day let-up. At the latest run second last of 10 at this track on February 4 over 1400m, 6 len behind Dream Searcher carrying 61kg at $11. The run before that 10th of 13 at this track on January 10 over 1200m, 10 len behind Pink Pigeon carrying 55.5kg at $34. Not going well enough to win this.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 37-day let-up. Last start 6th of 8 at this track in the G3 Riverworld Stud Prix Du Cup on February 28 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Princess Of Gaul with 60kg at $5.50. Before that won by 1.0 len at this track January 31 over 1200m defeating Princess Of Gaul with 56.5kg at $15. Genuine contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, squeezed out between Wild Applause and Be Merry.
Shifted out continually from the 200m to the finish.
Had difficulty obtaining clear running between the 400m and the 300m.

form.formComment: Comes off a 45 day let-up. Last start favourite; won by 0.5 len at Fairview LR February 20 over 1200m defeating Priscilla Maisey carrying 60kg at $2.80. The start before that 8th of 15 at this track in the G2 Sceptre Stakes on January 10 over 1200m, 3 len behind Gimme What I Want carrying 58kg at $21. Hard to beat again.
